summary: Rich soundboard capture of a solid fall ’79 show highlighted by a monster 'The Other One' and an epic 20‑minute 'Eyes of the World', despite a shaky 'Around and Around'.
review: All three reviewers praise the recording’s full, rich sound and note that this source sounds better than other board options. Musically the concert is strong – The Other One and a near‑20‑minute Eyes of the World receive high marks, while the only real blemish is an off‑key start by Bob on Around and Around.

ai_rating.rationale: Consistently positive 4‑star reviews emphasize good soundboard quality and a strong performance with only one minor song issue, yielding a high overall rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers describe the sound as full, rich and better than other board sources; no technical flaws or drop‑outs are mentioned.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Solid fall ’79 performance with a smooth transition from Estimated Prophet into an epic Eyes of the World; overall set is tight except for a mis‑step on Around and Around.

band_member_comments.Bob: Starts off‑key on 'Around and Around', hurting that song's impact
